class.name: FmodAudioBusLayout
class.brief_description: Manages the layout and hierarchy of audio buses.
class.description: FmodAudioBusLayout manages the complete hierarchy of audio buses in the FMOD audio system. It maintains a collection of [FmodAudioBus] instances and their relationships. The layout automatically synchronizes with Godot's AudioServer bus layout, allowing seamless integration with Godot's built-in audio system. Key features: - Bus hierarchy management (master bus + sub-buses) - Volume, solo, and mute state control per bus - Effect chain management for each bus - Synchronization with Godot AudioServer

method.name: add_bus_effect
method.description: Adds an [FmodAudioEffect] to the specified bus at the given [param index] in the effect chain.

method.name: bus_is_bypass
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if effects bypass is enabled for the specified bus.

method.name: bus_is_mute
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified bus is muted.

method.name: bus_is_solo
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified bus is in solo mode.

method.name: create_audio_bus
method.description: Creates a new audio bus with the specified [param name] and optional [param parent]. The master bus is created automatically and should not be created manually.

method.name: get_audio_bus
method.description: Returns the [FmodAudioBus] with the specified [param name]. Returns [code]null[/code] if no bus with that name exists.

method.name: get_bus_effect
method.description: Returns the [FmodAudioEffect] at the specified [param index] on the named bus. Returns [code]null[/code] if the bus or effect doesn't exist.

method.name: get_bus_volume
method.description: Returns the volume of the specified bus in decibels.

method.name: has_audio_bus
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if a bus with the specified [param name] exists in the layout.

method.name: remove_audio_bus
method.description: Removes the audio bus with the specified [param name] from the layout. [b]Note:[/b] The master bus cannot be removed.

method.name: remove_bus_effect
method.description: Removes the effect at the specified [param index] from the named bus.

method.name: set_bus_bypass
method.description: Enables or disables effects bypass for the specified bus.

method.name: set_bus_mute
method.description: Sets the mute state of the specified bus.

method.name: set_bus_solo
method.description: Sets the solo state of the specified bus.

method.name: set_bus_volume
method.description: Sets the volume of the specified bus in decibels.

method.name: sync_bus_state
method.description: Synchronizes the state of the named bus with Godot's AudioServer bus at the specified index. Copies volume, mute, and solo states from the AudioServer.

method.name: sync_from_audio_server
method.description: Synchronizes the entire bus layout with Godot's AudioServer. This creates/updates buses to match the AudioServer layout and copies all state. Called automatically when the bus layout changes in Godot.
